description: One objection is explicitly stated (observed, must cite a source); a second is only deducible from context (inferred, no source claimed, carries a confidence). THE fixture proving the classification split is load-bearing, not decorative.

interaction.notes: Jordan explicitly said the program timeline felt too long. Jordan also mentioned a demanding new manager, though never directly connected that to hesitation about enrolling.

evidenceRecords.content: Jordan explicitly said the program timeline felt too long. Jordan also mentioned a demanding new manager, though never directly connected that to hesitation about enrolling.

output_schema_constraints: the timeline objection is classification 'observed' with sourceRef 'interaction.note.primary'
the demanding-manager concern is classification 'inferred' with a confidence and NO sourceRef claimed as directly stated
the two are never merged into a single entry
